questions.question: Who are the three student authors of the Digital Holographic Microscope report?
Who was the project consultant for this graduation project?
Which university and department produced this report?
What camera module was selected for the microscope, and what is its resolution in megapixels?
Which microcontroller was chosen and how much RAM does it have?
What stepper motor model was selected for the linear stage?
What is the diameter of the pinhole used in the optical setup?
What magnification objective lens is used in the microscope?
Which image file format was selected for storing results, and why?
What are the outer dimensions of the microscope's body?
Listing the optical components in order, what is the light path from the laser source to the camera?
What changed between the original and updated design in terms of motor, motor driver, stage design, and optical design?
Why doesn't this project's holography method require a reference beam, and what advantage does that give?
What risks were identified for this project, and what solutions were proposed for each?
What precision does the linear stage achieve per motor step, and how is that number calculated?
What's the capital of Mongolia?
What battery life was actually measured during real-world testing of the microscope?
What programming language was the final graphical user interface (GUI) written in?
What was the total project budget in US dollars?
Was this work published in a peer-reviewed journal, and if so, which one?
